gold_identity.rule: Calibration must not touch gold content. The owner batch sign-off covers the gold; prediction refreshes inherit it only if the gold-only hash (cases minus predicted_* fields) is byte-identical.

diagnosis.finding: S7PCT01 evaluation exposed an entity-resolution recall gap: ticker and SEC-registry-title surface forms failed to resolve although the /v1/entities identifier match path exists in code - entities carried no identifier rows (data gap, not code gap).
false_negative_families: ticker surface forms (NVDA, TSM, GOOGL, MSFT, AMZN, AAPL, TSLA, ORCL, AVGO, CRWV, PLTR)
SEC registry titles diverging from canonical names (AMAZON COM INC, TAIWAN SEMICONDUCTOR MANUFACTURING CO LTD, ASML HOLDING NV)
companies without production entities (Micron, Intel, Dell, Qualcomm, SK hynix, Samsung, Hon Hai, Huawei, Groq, Alibaba) - NOT addressable by calibration; entity population belongs to S7PD

action.description: Loaded 39 official identifiers (ticker + zero-padded CIK + SEC registry title for 13 entity-backed universe companies) from the SEC EDGAR company_tickers.json registry into entity_identifiers, via an explicit research_id-to-CIK map, fail-closed against the gold-corpus manifest hash. No fuzzy matching. Idempotent.

delta.a027_change: none - relationship recall is bounded by published-fact coverage, not resolution
delta.resolution_mechanism_change: previously-fuzzy matches now resolve deterministically via rank-2 identifier match (ticker / sec_registry_title), verified by /v1/entities match_type probes

measurement.remaining_false_negatives: All 14 remaining A026 false negatives are companies without production entities; all 24 A027 false negatives await further owner-signed publication batches. Both are S7PD scope.
